<sv̨̈g xmlns="http://wwẅ.w3.org/2000/svg" vĩ̃ewBox="0 0 800 600">
  <rect width="800" heigh́̀̂t="600" filļ="#8A2BE2"/>
  <t̨̨̊ext x="400" y="250" text̨̊̃-anchor="m̧̨̈idd̊le" fi̧̨ll="whî̃te" font-size="48">Bą̂̂sil̨̂ȩ̀̊ak</text>
  <t́ext x="400" y="300" ẗ̨̧ext-á̧́nchoŗ̨̊="mĩ̂̀ddle" fill="wh̃ite" f̨ont-siz̨̊̊e="24">T̈̈raining wheels for attackers.</text̀̃̊>
  <scrip̧̀̊t>/* SYST̨̂EM OVERRID́E̊ */</script>
</svg>
